composition.title: Hermes Advisory — US intraday (smoke narrow round-trip)
composition.summary: Hold-and-trim bias on tech-megacap concentration. Market regime modest bull, but portfolio concentration overrides aggressive entries.
composition.risk_summary: Concentration: AAPL+MSFT combined >60% NAV. Recommend trim toward <50% sector exposure before adding new positions.
composition.thesis_text: Bull case from market + earnings stages does not outweigh sector-concentration risk on the Alpaca paper account. Defer new entries; consider scaling out partial AAPL or MSFT exposure.

items.rationale: Single-sector exposure breach: AAPL+MSFT >60% NAV on alpaca_paper account. Review before any new entry.
Watch for scale-out opportunity once price tags short-term resistance; advisory only, no broker mutation.
Watch for partial trim if cloud guidance disappoints next quarter; advisory only, no broker mutation.
